channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: moonshine-ai /moonshine | C++ | N/A
item.description: Very low latency speech to text, intent recognition, and text to speech, for building voice agents and interfaces

item.title: handy-computer /transcribe.cpp | C++ | N/A
item.description: ggml speech-to-text inference for 16+ model families

item.title: microsoft /Ontology-Playground | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Free, open-source web app for learning about ontologies and Microsoft Fabric IQ. Explore a catalogue of pre-built ontologies, design your own visually, export as RDF/XML, and share interactive diagrams. Zero backend, fully static.

item.title: oblien /openship | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Self-hosted deployment platform

item.title: iptv-org /iptv | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world

item.title: tokio-rs /topcoat | Rust | N/A
item.description: A batteries-included framework for building web apps

item.title: KnockOutEZ /wigolo | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: The go-to web for your AI coding agent — local-first search, fetch, crawl & research over MCP. No API keys, no cloud, $0/query. Public beta.

item.title: PrefectHQ /fastmcp | Python | N/A
item.description: 🚀 The fast, Pythonic way to build MCP servers and clients.

item.title: AstrBotDevs /AstrBot | Python | N/A
item.description: AI Agent Assistant & development framework that integrates lots of IM platforms, LLMs, plugins and AI feature, and can be your openclaw alternative. ✨

item.title: MoonshotAI /kimi-cli | Python | N/A
item.description: Kimi Code CLI is your next CLI agent.

item.title: every-app /open-seo | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Open source alternative to Semrush and Ahrefs

item.title: Robbyant /lingbot-map | Python | N/A
item.description: A feed-forward 3D foundation model for reconstructing scenes from streaming data

item.title: topoteretes /cognee | Python | N/A
item.description: Cognee is the open-source AI memory platform for agents. Give your AI agents persistent long-term memory across sessions with a self-hosted knowledge graph engine.

item.title: jamiepine /voicebox | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.

item.title: kvcache-ai /ktransformers | Python | N/A
item.description: A Flexible Framework for Experiencing Heterogeneous LLM Inference/Fine-tune Optimizations

item.title: msitarzewski /agency-agents | Shell | N/A
item.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

item.title: rohitg00 /ai-engineering-from-scratch | Python | N/A
item.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

item.title: diegosouzapw /OmniRoute | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Never stop coding. Free MIT AI gateway: one endpoint, 268+ providers (50+ free), 500+ models — Claude, GPT, Gemini, Kimi K3, GLM, DeepSeek. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot. Quota-aware auto-fallback, RTK+Caveman compression saves 15-95% tokens, MCP/A2A, multimodal, Desktop/PWA. Built by 500+ contributors.

item.title: 1jehuang /jcode | Rust | N/A
item.description: The most intelligent agent harness for code

item.title: tirth8205 /code-review-graph | Python | N/A
item.description: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.

item.title: bojieli /ai-agent-book | Python | N/A
item.description: 《深入理解 AI Agent：设计原理与工程实践》（李博杰 著）开源主仓库：全书正文、编译版 PDF 与按章配套代码
